provenance: WorldBible section 9: trudgeon trunks soaked in getilia sap harden to stone-like density and become fireproof (the Delta palisade and houses). This raw is the UNTREATED base wood; numbers invented for v0 balance, needs Eli's blessing.
notes: Base trudgeon must be FLAMMABLE so the getilia_soak treatment (sibling treatments raw) has something to negate: it mints 'trudgeon_wood@getilia_soak' with flammability 0 at load, which per ARCHITECTURE section 11 'never enters the burning map'. Dense hardwood: hardest of the woods to light (650 K), longest-burning (3400 fuelTicks; 650 + 3400 = 4050 <= 4095 under either parse of the fuel invariant).
